abstract.text: A multiline text editor.

inlineContent.text: A multiline text editor. It also has limited facilities for editing code, such as syntax highlighting support. For more advanced facilities for editing code, see
Most viewport, caret and edit methods contain a
support. The argument should be one of the following:
for the main caret, or greater than
When holding down [kbd]Alt[/kbd], the vertical scroll wheel will scroll 5 times as fast as it would normally do. This also works in the Godot script editor.
This object emits the following signals:
